planMd:
# Plan: Generate AI-driven Plan and Roadmap Using User Profile Data

## Summary

Create an AI-powered dynamic plan and roadmap generation system leveraging user profile and configuration data without hardcoding, following best practices and high-quality code standards.

## Tasks

1. Analyze existing roadmapService.ts for roadmap generation logic
2. Analyze user profile and configuration data usage in content and roadmap modules (depends on: Analyze existing roadmapService.ts for roadmap generation logic)
3. Design AI integration architecture for dynamic plan and roadmap generation (depends on: Analyze existing roadmapService.ts for roadmap generation logic, Analyze user profile and configuration data usage in content and roadmap modules)
4. Create AI prompt templates and data extraction logic for plan generation (depends on: Design AI integration architecture for dynamic plan and roadmap generation)
5. Implement AI-driven plan and roadmap generator service (depends on: Create AI prompt templates and data extraction logic for plan generation)
6. Refactor roadmapService.ts to use AI-driven roadmap generator (depends on: Implement AI-driven plan and roadmap generator service)
7. Create unit and integration tests for AI-driven plan generation modules (depends on: Refactor roadmapService.ts to use AI-driven roadmap generator)
8. Document AI-driven plan and roadmap generation implementation (depends on: Create unit and integration tests for AI-driven plan generation modules)
9. Validate full AI-driven plan generation workflow with end-to-end testing (depends on: Document AI-driven plan and roadmap generation implementation)
